subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto them that have believed in Him in His mighty and wondrous Day. Say: O people! By God, this is the Day of God, were ye to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن به فی یومه العزیز البدیع قل یا قوم تالله هذا یوم الله لو انتم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world
